## Summary
Brief description of the changes.

## Related Issue
Fixes #issue_number (if applicable).

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD improvement

## Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Docker image builds successfully
- [ ] Manually verified in Hermes + MCP environment

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is based on latest `development`
- [ ] Commits follow the contribution guidelines
- [ ] No secrets or API keys are committed
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code

## Screenshots / Evidence
If applicable, add screenshots, logs, or MCP tool outputs to demonstrate the change.
